message:
feat: Add writable VFS and re-execution trampoline to WASI shim

Phase 0 of package support: extend the WASI shim with write capabilities
and a fetch trampoline for async HTTP from synchronous WASM.

Writable VFS:
- writtenFiles overlay on read-only file map
- path_open with O_CREAT/O_TRUNC for file creation
- fd_write to file descriptors with auto-growing buffers
- path_create_directory, path_remove_directory, path_unlink_file, path_rename

Re-execution trampoline:
- Python exits with code 254 when it needs HTTP fetches
- JS reads pending requests from /tmp/_pymode_pending_fetches.json
- Executes all fetches in parallel via Promise.all
- Writes responses to /tmp/_pymode_fetch_responses/{hash}
- Re-runs Python with responses available in VFS
- Max 10 rounds to prevent infinite loops
